title: Global Product Marketing Content Specialist (f/m/d)
required_skills: 3-5 years B2B product marketing or content marketing experience
Technical content writing — translating complex topics into clear messaging
matched_skills: Automotive sector exposure (ECE Group competitive analysis)
missing_skills: Digital content production (website copy, newsletters, email campaigns)
Content performance metrics (open rates, click rates, engagement tracking)
core_responsibilities: Create customer-facing content that translates complex technical topics into value narratives
Develop and adapt multi-format content (website, campaigns, newsletters) aligned with brand messaging
Support campaign storytelling and thought leadership initiatives
Identify and develop customer case studies and use cases
Monitor and analyze content performance (engagement, open/click rates)
recommended_emphasis: Highlight content creation and storytelling work at Moli Media — product marketing campaigns that translated product features into audience-relevant messaging across digital channels
Emphasize argumentation guides and competitive comparison materials created at IPC and GRG Banking as examples of technical-to-clear-messaging translation
Quantify any content or collateral outputs (e.g., number of assets produced, campaigns run, reach/engagement metrics if available)
Surface the automotive sector exposure from ECE Group competitive analysis work explicitly
Frame 'Sales enablement & collateral development' as content creation for complex B2B product portfolios
Add a brief mention of any digital content tools used (e.g., CMS, email platforms, Google Analytics) if applicable
